MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY EUN H. LEE IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGEMNT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $150.00 ON JULY 1, 2009. PAY $150.00 OR MORE ON THE FIRST OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, EUN H. DBA TRENDY BEAN CAFE $946.80 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,051.80, THE COURT FINDS THE WRITTEN DEMAND DID NOT COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1719 IN THAT IT SOUGHT PAYMENT FOR MORE THAN THE AMOUNT OWED AND THEREFORE STATUTORY DAMAGES ARE UNAVAILABLE.
